particulars.description: All interests in any freehold or leasehold property now or in the future owned by the company, including 1 1A 2 and, 3 upper james street, london, W1F 9DE with title number NGL965386 and all copyright and similar rights in connection with any charged property owned by the company, in each case as specified (and defined) in the instrument registered by this form MR01. For more details please refer to the instrument.

persons_entitled.name: Barclays Bank PLC as Security Trustee for the Secured Parties

particulars.description: The leasehold property known as 1-3 upper james street, london, W1 with title number NGL396036 and the leasehold property known as 1-3 upper james street, london, W1 and more particularly described in the lease, to be granted on or about the date of this deed, between (1) the richard reeves foundation and (2) 1-3 upper james st limited pursuant to an agreement for lease dated 28 october 2016 and made between (1) the richard reeves foundation and (2) 1-3 upper james st limited with a title number to be allocated.
